packageRules.description: Commit Docker Compose image bumps (e.g. the Postgres/Caddy services in docker-compose*.yml) as `build(deps):` instead of inheriting a release-triggering `fix:`. These images are local/reference infrastructure, not the shipped product, so they should not cut a release. Must be extended AFTER semanticCommitType(*, fix): Renovate has no rule specificity, so the last matching packageRule wins. Dockerfile base images are intentionally left on `fix:` because they are the shipped runtime.
